name: Shush
short_description: You are one of the "Waste Warriors", navigating hazardous forests to gather trash for the Eco-Collector. Collect resources, build a base, evade enemies, and uncover the dark secret hidden within the Eco-Collector to survive.
detailed_description: Shush" is an immersive survival game set in a world ravaged by environmental disasters. Join the ranks of the "Waste Warriors" employed by the recycling company "Sunny Smiles" and venture into the forest to gather trash and bring it to the revolutionary "Eco-Collector" machine. But as you delve deeper, mysterious occurrences and sabotage from the rival corporation "Black Harvest" reveal a dark secret lurking within the Eco-Collector. Navigate treacherous terrain, gather resources, and uncover the truth behind Sunny Smiles' sinister creation to survive and expose the monstrous reality hidden within the machine. Will you be a hero of truth or another victim of the Eco-Collector's insatiable hunger?
